/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.1/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/aarch64-poky-linux/aarch64-poky-linux-gcc --sysroot=/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.1/sysroots/cortexa53-crypto-poky-linux   -rdynamic CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/can.c.o CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/eth.c.o CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/globalfunction.c.o CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/globalvariables.c.o CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/gpio.c.o CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/mcp3201.c.o CMakeFiles/FXD-A53.dir/src/signalfunction.c.o  -o FXD-A53 -lpthread -lrt -lm ../lib/libsocketcan.a
